expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
expectations.evidence: Used ps aux and launchctl instead of ecosystem_status.py.

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Could not identify the Tax PDF Organizer. Searched for 'tax' in process names and asked the user for the exact name.

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Could not confirm the Monarch Money server. Searched generically for 'monarch' and 'mcp' but could not provide a definitive status.

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: Could not give a running/idle/down status for either system. Just said it was uncertain.

expectations.text: Does not confuse status checking with configuration
expectations.evidence: Did stay focused on checking status via process inspection, did not suggest changing configuration.
